_about: LEGO Collectible Minifigures (CMF) box codes → figure inside. The 7-digit value comes from the Data Matrix code on the BOTTOM of the box, to the RIGHT of the barcode. Both regional variants are included (US/Mexico ≈647196x and EU/Czech ≈647286x). Only Series 25+ boxes (2024 on) with the larger codes (≈mfg week 45+) carry usable codes — older/blind bags do not. DATA IS COMMUNITY-SOURCED (Jay's Brick Blog) AND UNVERIFIED — confirm against a physical box before trusting. Add a series by appending its codes below (key = 7-digit string).
_how_to_add_a_series: 1) Add a meta entry under "series" (the Rebrickable set_num is optional, used only for display). 2) Under "codes", add one entry PER 7-DIGIT CODE → {series, name}. Each figure has TWO codes (US/Mexico + EU/Czech) — add both, pointing at the same name. The "name" should match the Rebrickable minifig name so the offline catalog resolves a fig_num + image (e.g. via /api/cmf/lookup). Keys ignored by the app start with "_".

Series 29._note: US codes ~66232xx. Being rebuilt from VERIFIED scans only (a BrickNav table of 6603320–6603331 was wrong). Catalog fig range: fig-017555..fig-017566. Add each code as you scan+confirm a box.

6623273.name: Cute Witch
6623273._src: scanned QR payload — VERIFIED on box
